TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I 1941 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 23 a romi'ad masofoc ci Sergio Mattarella, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Italy anini i ci Sergio Mattarella, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 3 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i s…ôr*io~u mattar…ô…æ…æa, ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ita…æj anini i ¶i s…ôr*io~u mattar…ô…æ…æa, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
